Name: Slack
Description: Slack is a business communication platform offering real-time messaging and file sharing for teams. Used by enterprises worldwide for async collaboration.

Name: Notion
Description: Notion is an all-in-one workspace combining notes docs wikis and project management. Popular with startups and remote teams.

Name: Figma
Description: Figma is a collaborative interface design tool that runs in the browser. Acquired by Adobe for $20B then deal cancelled.

Name: Linear
Description: Linear is a project management tool built for software teams. Known for speed and keyboard-first UX.

Name: Vercel
Description: Vercel is a cloud platform for frontend developers providing hosting and serverless functions. Created Next.js framework.

Name: Airtable
Description: Airtable is a low-code platform for building collaborative apps. Combines spreadsheet simplicity with database power.

Name: Loom
Description: Loom is an async video messaging tool for work. Record screen and camera then share instantly via link.

Name: Retool
Description: Retool lets teams build internal tools fast with drag-and-drop components connected to any database or API.

Name: Calendly
Description: Calendly is a scheduling automation platform that eliminates back-and-forth emails for booking meetings.

Name: Datadog
Description: Datadog is a monitoring and analytics platform for cloud-scale applications. Provides full-stack observability.
